title: centaurea × perlakyana
intro: Centaurea × perlakyana, also known as Perlakyana Cornflower, is a hybrid plant of the genus Centaurea, a group of flowering plants in the daisy family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Centaurea × perlakyana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
